TABLE.NAME: tool_murelation_framework
TABLE.COMMENT: User relation framework that defines type of user relation

FIELD.NAME: name
FIELD.COMMENT: Full name of the framework

FIELD.NAME: idnumber
FIELD.COMMENT: Optional external identifier - globally unique

FIELD.NAME: description
FIELD.COMMENT: Description of the framework intended use

FIELD.NAME: uimode
FIELD.COMMENT: 1 means Supervisors mode, 2 means Teams mode - cannot be changed

FIELD.NAME: visibility
FIELD.COMMENT: 0 means hidden, 1 means position managers, 2 means supervisors and subordinates, 3 means also course teachers, 4 means everybody

FIELD.NAME: alltenants
FIELD.COMMENT: 1 means available for new supervisor positions in all tenants, 0 only in selected tenants.

FIELD.NAME: managecohortid
FIELD.COMMENT: If set cohort membership and capability is required to edit supervisors/teams and subordinates

FIELD.NAME: supervisortitle
FIELD.COMMENT: Designation of supervisor entity or team of subordinates - Classroom A, Teacher, Manager

FIELD.NAME: supervisorstitle
FIELD.COMMENT: How to call a list of supervisors in the framework - Classrooms, Teachers, Managers

FIELD.NAME: supervisorcohortid
FIELD.COMMENT: If set candidates for supervisors must be from this cohort

FIELD.NAME: supervisorroleid
FIELD.COMMENT: Optional role assigned to supervisors in context of subordinate users

FIELD.NAME: subordinatetitle
FIELD.COMMENT: Designation of subordinate position - Student, Employee, Learner, Child

FIELD.NAME: subordinatestitle
FIELD.COMMENT: How to call list of subordinates in the framework - Students, Employees, Learners

FIELD.NAME: subordinatecohortid
FIELD.COMMENT: If set candidates for subordinates must be from this cohort

INDEX.NAME: idnumber
INDEX.COMMENT: Enforces unique idnumber for all frameworks if defined

TABLE.NAME: tool_murelation_tenant_allow
TABLE.COMMENT: Allowed frameworks for tenants - restricts adding of new positions and profile visibility

FIELD.NAME: frameworkid
FIELD.COMMENT: Relation framework

FIELD.NAME: tenantid
FIELD.COMMENT: Allowed tenant id

TABLE.NAME: tool_murelation_supervisor
TABLE.COMMENT: Represents supervisor position or a whole team depending on framework mode

FIELD.NAME: frameworkid
FIELD.COMMENT: Relation framework

FIELD.NAME: tenantid
FIELD.COMMENT: Optional tenant id - access control and it limits who can be supervisor and subordinate, need to switch tenants to add for now; in supervisors mode it matches subordinate tenant id

FIELD.NAME: teamname
FIELD.COMMENT: Team name - required in team mode, optional otherwise - always NULL in Supervisors mode

FIELD.NAME: teamidnumber
FIELD.COMMENT: External team identifier - globally unique, always NULL in Supervisors mode

FIELD.NAME: teamcohortid
FIELD.COMMENT: Team cohort for all subordinates aka team members, always NULL in Supervisors mode

FIELD.NAME: supmanaged
FIELD.COMMENT: 1 means supervisor may add and remove team members if the have viewpositions permission, 0 means only standard position management permissions apply, not used in Supervisors mode

FIELD.NAME: maxsubordinates
FIELD.COMMENT: Maximum number of subordinates in team, null means no limit, always 1 in Supervisors mode

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: Supervisor user id - NULL if position not assigned, required in Supervisors mode

INDEX.NAME: tenantid
INDEX.COMMENT: Used instead of foreign key because multi-tenancy tables may not be available

INDEX.NAME: teamidnumber
INDEX.COMMENT: Enforces unique idnumber for teams if defined

FIELD.NAME: supervisorid
FIELD.COMMENT: Supervisor position reference

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: Subordinate user id

FIELD.NAME: frameworkid
FIELD.COMMENT: Relation framework - auxiliary field, must match supervisor framework id

FIELD.NAME: teamposition
FIELD.COMMENT: Optional team position name - always NULL in Supervisors mode

INDEX.NAME: frameworkid-userid
INDEX.COMMENT: Each user may take max one subordinate position in each framework
